name: Smooth Inheritance Mode — Uncontested Legacy
description: When benefics dominate the 8th house, 4th lord is strong, and no malefic affliction exists on inheritance axis, the property transfer is smooth, legal, and uncontested.

source_text.quote: When the 8th house is blessed by benefics and the 4th lord is strong, inheritance flows like water downhill — smoothly, naturally, and without obstruction.

interpretation.meaning: The inheritance axis is clear and protected. Property transfers smoothly through legal channels without family disputes or litigation.

metadata.notes: Best outcome mode. Legal formalities are formalities, not battles.

name: Disputed Property Mode — Litigation & Family Feuds
description: When malefics afflict the 8th house, 6th house is connected to 4th/8th, and Mars-Saturn influence property houses, inheritance is contested with litigation and family disputes.

source_text.quote: When the 6th lord connects to the 4th or 8th, property matters become litigation. Family members turn adversaries, and inheritance is won only through legal battle.

all_of: 6th lord connected to 4th or 8th house (litigation over property)

interpretation.meaning: Property inheritance will involve legal disputes. Family members contest the will, boundaries are disputed, and court intervention is needed. Victory is possible but through effort.

metadata.notes: Challenging but not hopeless. Legal victory is possible — requires patience and documentation.

name: Sudden Gain Mode — Unexpected Property & Windfalls
description: When Rahu/Ketu axis connects to 4th/8th/11th houses and Jupiter supports, sudden unexpected property gains, lottery wins, or windfall inheritance from unknown sources is indicated.

source_text.quote: Rahu connected to the 4th and 8th with Jupiter's blessing brings sudden property from unexpected quarters — foreign land, distant relatives, or sources previously unknown.

all_of: Rahu or Ketu connected to 4th/8th/11th houses
any_of: Rahu in 4th or 8th with benefic aspect

interpretation.meaning: Sudden, unexpected property gains. Sources may be distant relatives, foreign connections, or previously unknown assets. The windfall nature means timing is crucial — when dasha activates, gains are rapid.

metadata.notes: Rahu = unconventional. With Jupiter = blessed sudden gains. Foreign property or unknown inheritance.

name: Karmic Pattern Mode — Inherited Debt & Karmic Obligations
description: When Saturn afflicts the 4th/8th/9th axis and Ketu is in property houses, inheritance comes with karmic obligations — property maintenance burden, inherited debts, or ancestral curses on land.

source_text.quote: Saturn afflicting the property axis and Ketu in houses of inheritance brings property with karmic burden. The native inherits ancestral debts along with assets, and must resolve past-life property karma.

all_of: Saturn afflicts 4th or 8th house (occupation or harsh aspect)

interpretation.meaning: Inheritance comes with strings attached. Property may have legal encumbrances, ancestral debts, or maintenance burdens. The native must resolve karmic obligations before enjoying the assets fully.

metadata.notes: Property comes with karma. Must resolve debts/disputes before full enjoyment. Saturn + Ketu = past-life property karma.

name: Inherited Debt Mode — Liability Over Asset
description: When 8th lord is in 12th (loss through inheritance), 6th lord aspects 4th (debt on property), and no benefic support exists, inherited property brings more liability than benefit.

source_text.quote: When the 8th lord occupies the 12th and the 6th lord afflicts the 4th, inheritance brings debt. The property is mortgaged, encumbered, or costs more to maintain than it yields.

all_of: 6th lord aspects or is connected to 4th house (debt on property)

interpretation.meaning: Inherited property is a net liability. Mortgages, encumbrances, maintenance costs, or legal fees exceed the property's value. Better to decline or negotiate debt clearance before accepting.

metadata.notes: Worst outcome. Property = debt. Evaluate carefully before accepting inherited liabilities.

name: Mixed Quality — Partial Gains with Conditions
description: When both benefics and malefics influence the property axis, inheritance is partial — some assets gained smoothly while others are contested. Mixed quality requires careful navigation.

source_text.quote: When both benefic and malefic planets influence the 4th and 8th houses, the native gains some property easily while other portions face dispute. Mixed results require wisdom in navigation.

all_of: Both benefic AND malefic planets influence 4th or 8th house

interpretation.meaning: Mixed inheritance outcome. Some assets (e.g., land) come smoothly while others (e.g., liquid wealth) are contested. The native gains partial benefit and must strategically choose which claims to pursue.

metadata.notes: Most common outcome in practice. Some smooth, some disputed. Strategy matters.
